Off Calendar Aug-15-2022 Continued To Aug-29-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-27-2022 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-14-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Alec Harrington, via CourtCall, for Robert Wiseman, Petitioner.

The court begins by advising counsel that it is waiving defects in notice. Counsel provides brief oral testimony in support of the petition.

The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The holographic will dated Apr-12-2012 is admitted to probate. Robert C. Wiseman is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for July 27, 2022, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Balmy. Not reported.
